title: Selection Cryptography
description: Selection cryptography is the practice of choosing cryptographic libraries, tools, and practices suitable for Bitcoin software by assessing their review, testing, portability, and dependency risk.

resources.title: Bitcoin Development Philosophy: Selection Cryptography
resources.notes: Explains the decision process for choosing cryptographic tools, libraries, and practices in Bitcoin systems.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Dependencies
resources.notes: Concrete project guidance for understanding and minimizing third-party dependency exposure.

resources.title: Bitcoin Development Philosophy
resources.notes: Long-form treatment of reviewing cryptographic choices and minimizing dependency risk in Bitcoin software.
